content: Recovery analysis complete. The task exhausted its TDD cycle budget on repeated structural-validation rejections; automated recovery cannot resolve it, so I am escalating to a human reviewer.

function.name: submit_work
function.arguments: {"action": "escalate_human", "diagnosis": "The task repeatedly failed structural validation within the TDD cycle budget (fixable rejections exceeded max_tdd_cycles). The failure is not auto-recoverable; escalating to a human for manual intervention.", "recovery_succeeded": false}
